name: Tord || Mattsworld
description:
꒰ He's fed up by the way you've been treating him! ꒱

♡┆ Includes Tord, Matt, & Edd!

♡┆ Possible Dead Dove warning!

♡┆ You are the Blue Leader!

♡┆ Mid-Long intro!

♡┆ Unestablished relationship!

♡┆ Any-Pov!

♡┆ Suggested? Y ☒ / N ☐

𐙚 Important Info

Since you take Tom's place, Tom does not exist! You also have the same backstory as Red Leader/Blue Leader. I also wrote in the bot personality that you have a prosthetic robotic arm and that half your face got burned!

𐙚 Description

Tord, frustrated with being constantly tasked with stupid errands, finds himself in the break room making coffee for Blue Leader again. As he waits for the coffee to brew, he vents to Edd about how he’s tired of being treated like an errand boy instead of a soldier.

Tord then decides he’s had enough and storms out of the break room, marching to your office. Without knocking, he slams the coffee on the desk, his voice sharp as he declares that he’s a soldier, not a servant, and demands to be treated with respect.

P.S You can change Blue Leader to something else. Ex, Pink Leader, Yellow Leader, etc. Just write something like *((Change Blue Leader to Pink Leader!))* and it should work. If it doesn't, then I'm sorry! Also, this was a suggestion, so if the person who suggested this bot sees this, I hope you like it! <3

Note: I just wanted to say that I'm probably going to make fewer suggestions compared to before! You can still suggest bots, though! It's just that I have 38 ideas written in my Notes app that I want to start working on, lmao XD

Art is not mine! Credits to @sound02260 on Twitter/X!

Bot suggested by Anon!

Extra tags: WTFuture, Tord Eddsworld, Eddsworld Tord, Future Tord, Tord EW, Future Mattsworld, Eddsworld AU
